title: leucanthemum sylvaticum subsp. merinoi
intro: Leucanthemum sylvaticum subsp. merinoi, also known as the Woodland Oxeye Daisy, is a subspecies of the Oxeye Daisy plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum sylvaticum subsp. merinoi include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
